_calibration: CALIBRATION FIXTURE (known-bad, deliberately committed): over-escaped dead regex class. In this JSON source the pattern reads dpo[@\\s] which compiles to the character class {@, backslash, s} - it can NEVER match whitespace after 'dpo' as intended, so the rule is dead and its absence-style breach can never be evidenced. The catalogue regex-health linter MUST flag this rule in --calibrate mode, or it has not earned its zero.
